oai_dc:dc.dc:title: A Message from the President
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: LePage, Mary Ellen
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 50 Number 2 (April 2023).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.President’s Message Looking to the FutureThe American Federation of Aviculture (AFA) was founded in 1974 as a Federation of bird clubs. It made sense at that time for the bird clubs to be the foundation of AFA because there were over 350 bird clubs throughout the country which gave AFA a very strong foundation.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 50 No. 2 (2023): Watchbird April 2023; 3
